brief_html: Sets the port used by the client for hosting WAR3/W3XP games. This value is retrieved from HKCU\Software\Blizzard Entertainment\Warcraft III\Gameplay\netgameport, and is sent after the user logs on.
remarks_html: Sets the port used by the client for hosting WAR3/W3XP games. This value is retrieved from HKCU\Software\Blizzard Entertainment\Warcraft III\Gameplay\netgameport, and is sent after the user logs on.
